openFindings.title: Deferred or not-applicable checklist items keep implementation-summary-backed packets in_progress
openFindings.impact: The fallback treats any unchecked task-list marker as incomplete, so packets with accepted deferred P2 or not-applicable checklist rows do not derive complete even when implementation-summary.md exists.

openFindings.title: Ordered markdown task lists are invisible to checklist completion
openFindings.impact: A checklist written as '1. [x] ...' produces zero recognized checklist items and therefore derives INCOMPLETE.

openFindings.title: Non-canonical status strings can be persisted as derived status
openFindings.impact: Unknown frontmatter or override status values are normalized and returned instead of being rejected or mapped to unknown, and the schema accepts any non-empty status string.

openFindings.title: Status fallback tests miss deferred/not-applicable checklist semantics
openFindings.impact: The regression suite covers all checked, one unchecked, and no checklist cases, but not the common completed-packet pattern where unchecked P2 rows are explicitly deferred or not applicable.
